title: taraxacum arrectipes
intro: Taraxacum arrectipes, also known as the upright dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum arrectipes include its potential to support liver health, boost the immune system, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum arrectipes can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of health issues.
